items.title: Opendoor Jumps 7%, Offerpad Rises 6% as iBuyer Stocks Rally
items.summary: Shares of Opendoor Technologies (NASDAQ:OPEN) are trading higher by 7% to $4.96 in midday action, while fellow iBuyer Offerpad Solutions (NYSE:OPAD) is up 6% to $5.26.
